text:
I know this song because The Gamer Symphony Orchestra xd:

"This was a triumph.
I'm making a note here: 
HUGE SUCCESS.
It's hard to overstate my satisfaction.

Aperture Science.
We do what we must because we can.
For the good of all of us
Except the ones who are dead. [people laughing.]

But there's no sense crying over every mistake.
You just keep on trying till you run out of cake.
And the science gets done and you make a neat gun.
For the people who are still alive."

xd

text:
"This was a triumph.
I'm playing a note here: HUGE SUCCESS.
It's hard to overstate my satisfaction.
Playing Piano
We play what we must
because we can.
For the good of all of us.
Except the ones who are deaf.
But there's no sense crying over every mistake.
You just keep on playing till you run out of cake.
And the Music gets done.
And you play it good hun'
For the people who are still alive."

:D
